title: SuperLeashes
description: A plugin that allows you to leash anything with various other leash changes that aim to improve user experience
body:
Super![icon_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15ff2a2afc809d0b582cb3dc8ba5daaa37c9df8d.png)Leashes</br>
This plugin allows you to leash almost any entity, all dependant on permissionss!
</br>
for support, join my discord server: https://discord.gg/gJkMwN63MU

<details>
<summary>commands</summary>

superleashes:</br>
description: SuperLeashes info</br>
default: true</br>
usage: /superleashes</br>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

superleashes.safe:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Keep mobs safe</br>

superleashes.unbreakable:</br>
default: false</br>
description: move far away without leashes breaking</br>

superleashes.unbreakable.portal:</br>
default: false</br>
description: use a portal without leashes breaking</br>

superleashes.unbreakable.teleport:</br>
default: false</br>
description: teleport without leashes breaking</br>

superleashes.reload:</br>
default: op</br>
description: Reload SuperLeashes</br>

superleashes.leash.*:</br>
default: op</br>
description: Leash all mobs</br>

superleashes.leash.hostile:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash almost all hostile entities.</br>

superleashes.leash.bosses:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash bosses/minibosses.</br>
children:</br>
superleashes.leash.ENDER_DRAGON: true</br>
superleashes.leash.GIANT: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WITHER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WARDEN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ELDER_GAURDIAN: true</br>

superleashes.leash.hostile.*:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash almost all hostile entities excluding bosses.</br>
children:</br>
superleashes.leash.hostile.overworld: true</br>
superleashes.leash.hostile.nether: true</br>
superleashes.leash.hostile.end: true</br>

superleashes.leash.hostile.overworld:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash almost all hostile entities that normally reside in the overworld, excluding bosses.</br>
children:</br>
superleashes.leash.BLAZE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.CAVE_SPIDER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.CREEPER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ELDER_GAURDIAN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ENDER_DRAGON: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ENDERMAN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ENDERMITE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.EVOKER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.GHAST: true</br>
superleashes.leash.GIANT: true</br>
superleashes.leash.GUARDIAN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.HOGLIN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.HUSK: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ILLUSIONER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.MAGMA_CUBE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.PHANTOM: true</br>
superleashes.leash.PIGLIN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.PIGLIN_BRUTE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.PILLAGER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.POLAR_BEAR: true</br>
superleashes.leash.RAVAGER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SHULKER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SILVERFISH: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SKELETON: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SLIME: true</br>
superleashes.leash.STRAY: true</br>
superleashes.leash.VEX: true</br>
superleashes.leash.VINDICATOR: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WARDEN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WITCH: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WITHER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ZOMBIE: true</br>

superleashes.leash.hostile.nether:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash almost all hostile entities that normally reside in the nether, excluding bosses.</br>
children:</br>
superleashes.leash.BLAZE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.GHAST: true</br>
superleashes.leash.HOGLIN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.MAGMA_CUBE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.PIGLIN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.PIGLIN_BRUTE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WITHER_SKELETON: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ZOGLIN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ZOMBIE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ZOMBIFIED_PIGLIN: true</br>

superleashes.leash.hostile.end:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash almost all hostile entities that normally reside in the end, excluding bosses.</br>
children:</br>
superleashes.leash.ENDERMAN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.ENDERMITE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SHULKER: true</br>

superleashes.leash.passive:</br>
default: false</br>
description: Leash passive entities.</br>
children:</br>
superleashes.leash.ALLAY: true</br>
superleashes.leash.AXOLOTL: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SHEEP: true</br>
superleashes.leash.SNOWMAN: true</br>
superleashes.leash.STRIDER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.VILLAGER: true</br>
superleashes.leash.TRADER_LLAMA: true</br>
superleashes.leash.TURTLE: true</br>
superleashes.leash.WOLF: true​</br>

</details>
